name: luau-data-transform
goal: Port the OCaml data-transformation pipeline to Luau, running on the Lune standalone runtime. Copy protobuf schemas as the source of truth, hand-write Luau type definitions with JSON serialization, reimplement all transform utils and field mappings in idiomatic Luau, port all 26 tests, and implement pure-Luau binary protobuf encode/decode.

specs.name: project-setup
specs.goal: Initialize the Luau project with Lune runtime, directory structure, tooling configuration, and proto schema files copied from the OCaml repo. Establish build/run/test conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: Lune is installed and lune run executes a hello-world .luau script successfully
Directory structure created: lib/, test/, test/fixtures/, proto/, proto/tables/, bin/
All .proto files and .json constants files copied verbatim from ocaml-data-transform/proto/ into proto/
Test fixtures (values.json, transformed_values.json) copied verbatim into test/fixtures/
A .luaurc or Lune config file is set up for module resolution
--!strict mode is used in all .luau files
A minimal test runner script exists (lune run test) that runs a single passing placeholder test and reports results
.gitignore configured appropriately
README.md documents setup prerequisites, how to run, and how to test

specs.name: types-and-schema
specs.goal: Define all protobuf-equivalent Luau types and implement schema loading from JSON constants files. Port schema.ml functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Luau export type definitions for all 6 simple types and 15 compound types
Luau export type for TableSchema, FieldGroup, SingleFieldType
Luau export type for source-table and target-table specific types
Constructor/make functions for each type
load_data_type_constants() function that reads proto/data_types_constants.json
load_source_table_schema() and load_target_table_schema() functions
JSON encode/decode functions for SourceTableFieldsMap and TargetTableFieldsMap
3 schema tests ported
5 protobuf tests ported as JSON round-trip tests

specs.name: transform-engine
specs.goal: Port json_path, transform_utils, mappings, example_mappings, CLI entry point, and integration test. Core data transformation logic.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/json_path.luau ported with getPath, setPath, getString, getStringOrEmpty, getStringList
4 json_path tests ported
lib/transform_utils.luau ported with identity, groupBy, mergeBy, mapValues, deepMerge
6 transform_utils tests ported
lib/mappings.luau ported with textboxMapping, checkboxMapping, customMapping, applyMapping, transformAll
2 mappings tests ported
lib/example_mappings.luau ported with splitName and transform (6 field mappings)
15 example_mappings tests ported
bin/main.luau CLI entry point
1 integration test ported

specs.name: protobuf-binary
specs.goal: Implement pure-Luau protobuf binary wire format encoding and decoding. Add binary round-trip tests.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/pb/wire.luau with varint, zigzag, fixed32/64 encode/decode
lib/pb/encoder.luau for protobuf message encoding
lib/pb/decoder.luau for protobuf message decoding
lib/pb/schema_registry.luau for proto schema loading and dispatch
Binary round-trip tests for StringType, MultipleCheckboxType, AddressType, TableSchema
JSON-then-binary interop test

contracts.exports: Project directory layout convention, module require paths, Lune runtime, test runner invocation pattern
lib/json_path.luau, lib/transform_utils.luau, lib/mappings.luau, lib/example_mappings.luau, bin/main.luau CLI
